Trait.name: Blacksmith
Trait.label: Blacksmith
Trait.description: Trained in forging and shaping metal into tools, weapons, and armor.

Trait.name: Herbalist
Trait.label: Herbalist
Trait.description: Skilled in identifying, gathering, and preparing medicinal and poisonous plants.

Trait.name: Hunter
Trait.label: Hunter
Trait.description: Skilled at tracking and hunting wild game for food and materials.

Trait.name: Farmer
Trait.label: Farmer
Trait.description: Experienced in cultivating crops and managing agricultural land.

Trait.name: Cook
Trait.label: Cook
Trait.description: Trained in preparing meals that are both nourishing and appealing.

Trait.name: Physician
Trait.label: Physician
Trait.description: Trained in diagnosing and treating illness and injury.

Trait.name: Scholar
Trait.label: Scholar
Trait.description: Devoted to the study of books, history, and academic knowledge.

Trait.name: Engineer
Trait.label: Engineer
Trait.description: Skilled in designing and constructing mechanical or structural systems.

Trait.name: Mechanic
Trait.label: Mechanic
Trait.description: Experienced in repairing and maintaining machinery and equipment.

Trait.name: Carpenter
Trait.label: Carpenter
Trait.description: Skilled in working with wood to build and repair structures and furniture.

Trait.name: Merchant
Trait.label: Merchant
Trait.description: Experienced in trade, negotiation, and the buying and selling of goods.

Trait.name: Warrior
Trait.label: Warrior
Trait.description: Trained extensively in combat and the use of weapons.

Trait.name: Strategist
Trait.label: Strategist
Trait.description: Skilled in planning campaigns, battles, and long-term tactical decisions.

Trait.name: Diplomat
Trait.label: Diplomat
Trait.description: Trained in negotiation, persuasion, and resolving conflicts between parties.

Trait.name: Theologian
Trait.label: Theologian
Trait.description: Devoted to the study and practice of religious doctrine and faith.

Trait.name: Administrator
Trait.label: Administrator
Trait.description: Skilled in managing bureaucracy, records, and the affairs of an organization.

Trait.name: Craftsman
Trait.label: Craftsman
Trait.description: Skilled in creating fine handmade goods with precision and care.

Trait.name: Scout
Trait.label: Scout
Trait.description: Trained in reconnaissance, tracking, and navigating unfamiliar terrain.

Trait.name: Master Thief
Trait.label: Master Thief
Trait.description: Highly skilled in stealth, lockpicking, and stealing unnoticed.

Trait.name: Musician
Trait.label: Musician
Trait.description: Skilled in performing music, able to captivate audiences with their craft.

Trait.name: Fisherman
Trait.label: Fisherman
Trait.description: Experienced in catching fish and navigating bodies of water.

Trait.name: Miner
Trait.label: Miner
Trait.description: Experienced in extracting ore, stone, and other resources from the earth.

Trait.name: Tailor
Trait.label: Tailor
Trait.description: Skilled in sewing and crafting clothing and fabric goods.

Trait.name: Alchemist
Trait.label: Alchemist
Trait.description: Skilled in combining substances to create potions, elixirs, and reagents.
